section.heading: Partners for Fish and Wildlife Program
section.chapeau: The Secretary shall carry out the Partners for Fish and Wildlife Program within the United States Fish and Wildlife Service to provide—

paragraph.content: technical and financial assistance to private landowners for the conduct of voluntary projects to benefit Federal trust species by promoting habitat improvement, habitat restoration, habitat enhancement, and habitat establishment; and
technical assistance to other public and private entities regarding fish and wildlife habitat restoration on private land.
